<content>1: /*!!
2:  *  Canvas 2 Svg v1.0.19
3:  *  A low level canvas to SVG converter. Uses a mock canvas context to build an SVG document.
4:  *
5:  *  Licensed under the MIT license:
6:  *  http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.php
7:  *
8:  *  Author:
9:  *  Kerry Liu
10:  *

12:  */
13: 
14: ;(function () {
15:     "use strict";
16: 
17:     var STYLES, ctx, CanvasGradient, CanvasPattern, namedEntities;
18: 
19:     //helper function to format a string
20:     function format(str, args) {
21:         var keys = Object.keys(args), i;
22:         for (i=0; i<keys.length; i++) {
23:             str = str.replace(new RegExp("\\{" + keys[i] + "\\}", "gi"), args[keys[i]]);
24:         }
25:         return str;
26:     }
27: 
28:     //helper function that generates a random string
29:     function randomString(holder) {
30:         var chars, randomstring, i;
31:         if (!holder) {
32:             throw new Error("cannot create a random attribute name for an undefined object");
33:         }
34:         chars = "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXTZabcdefghiklmnopqrstuvwxyz";
35:         randomstring = "";
36:         do {
37:             randomstring = "";
38:             for (i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
39:                 randomstring += chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)];
40:             }
41:         } while (holder[randomstring]);
42:         return randomstring;
43:     }
44: 
45:     //helper function to map named to numbered entities
46:     function createNamedToNumberedLookup(items, radix) {
47:         var i, entity, lookup = {}, base10, base16;
48:         items = items.split(',');
49:         radix = radix || 10;
50:         // Map from named to numbered entities.
51:         for (i = 0; i < items.length; i += 2) {
52:             entity = '&' + items[i + 1] + ';';
53:             base10 = parseInt(items[i], radix);
54:             lookup[entity] = '&#'+base10+';';
55:         }
56:         //FF and IE need to create a regex from hex values ie   == \xa0
57:         lookup["\\xa0"] = ' ';
58:         return lookup;
59:     }
60: 
61:     //helper function to map canvas-textAlign to svg-textAnchor
62:     function getTextAnchor(textAlign) {
63:         //TODO: support rtl languages
64:         var mapping = {"left":"start", "right":"end", "center":"middle", "start":"start", "end":"end"};
65:         return mapping[textAlign] || mapping.start;
66:     }
67: 
68:     //helper function to map canvas-textBaseline to svg-dominantBaseline
69:     function getDominantBaseline(textBaseline) {
70:         //INFO: not supported in all browsers
71:         var mapping = {"alphabetic": "alphabetic", "hanging": "hanging", "top":"text-before-edge", "bottom":"text-after-edge", "middle":"central"};
72:         return mapping[textBaseline] || mapping.alphabetic;
73:     }
74: 
75:     // Unpack entities lookup where the numbers are in radix 32 to reduce the size
76:     // entity mapping courtesy of tinymce
77:     namedEntities = createNamedToNumberedLookup(
78:         '50,nbsp,51,iexcl,52,cent,53,pound,54,curren,55,yen,56,brvbar,57,sect,58,uml,59,copy,' +
79:             '5a,ordf,5b,laquo,5c,not,5d,shy,5e,reg,5f,macr,5g,deg,5h,plusmn,5i,sup2,5j,sup3,5k,acute,' +
80:             '5l,micro,5m,para,5n,middot,5o,cedil,5p,sup1,5q,ordm,5r,raquo,5s,frac14,5t,frac12,5u,frac34,' +
81:             '5v,iquest,60,Agrave,61,Aacute,62,Acirc,63,Atilde,64,Auml,65,Aring,66,AElig,67,Ccedil,' +
82:             '68,Egrave,69,Eacute,6a,Ecirc,6b,Euml,6c,Igrave,6d,Iacute,6e,Icirc,6f,Iuml,6g,ETH,6h,Ntilde,' +
83:             '6i,Ograve,6j,Oacute,6k,Ocirc,6l,Otilde,6m,Ouml,6n,times,6o,Oslash,6p,Ugrave,6q,Uacute,' +
84:             '6r,Ucirc,6s,Uuml,6t,Yacute,6u,THORN,6v,szlig,70,agrave,71,aacute,72,acirc,73,atilde,74,auml,' +
85:             '75,aring,76,aelig,77,ccedil,78,egrave,79,eacute,7a,ecirc,7b,euml,7c,igrave,7d,iacute,7e,icirc,' +
86:             '7f,iuml,7g,eth,7h,ntilde,7i,ograve,7j,oacute,7k,ocirc,7l,otilde,7m,ouml,7n,divide,7o,oslash,' +
87:             '7p,ugrave,7q,uacute,7r,ucirc,7s,uuml,7t,yacute,7u,thorn,7v,yuml,ci,fnof,sh,Alpha,si,Beta,' +
88:             'sj,Gamma,sk,Delta,sl,Epsilon,sm,Zeta,sn,Eta,so,Theta,sp,Iota,sq,Kappa,sr,Lambda,ss,Mu,' +
89:             'st,Nu,su,Xi,sv,Omicron,t0,Pi,t1,Rho,t3,Sigma,t4,Tau,t5,Upsilon,t6,Phi,t7,Chi,t8,Psi,' +
90:             't9,Omega,th,alpha,ti,beta,tj,gamma,tk,delta,tl,epsilon,tm,zeta,tn,eta,to,theta,tp,iota,' +
91:             'tq,kappa,tr,lambda,ts,mu,tt,nu,tu,xi,tv,omicron,u0,pi,u1,rho,u2,sigmaf,u3,sigma,u4,tau,' +
92:             'u5,upsilon,u6,phi,u7,chi,u8,psi,u9,omega,uh,thetasym,ui,upsih,um,piv,812,bull,816,hellip,' +
93:             '81i,prime,81j,Prime,81u,oline,824,frasl,88o,weierp,88h,image,88s,real,892,trade,89l,alefsym,' +
94:             '8cg,larr,8ch,uarr,8ci,rarr,8cj,darr,8ck,harr,8dl,crarr,8eg,lArr,8eh,uArr,8ei,rArr,8ej,dArr,' +
95:             '8ek,hArr,8g0,forall,8g2,part,8g3,exist,8g5,empty,8g7,nabla,8g8,isin,8g9,notin,8gb,ni,8gf,prod,' +
96:             '8gh,sum,8gi,minus,8gn,lowast,8gq,radic,8gt,prop,8gu,infin,8h0,ang,8h7,and,8h8,or,8h9,cap,8ha,cup,' +
97:             '8hb,int,8hk,there4,8hs,sim,8i5,cong,8i8,asymp,8j0,ne,8j1,equiv,8j4,le,8j5,ge,8k2,sub,8k3,sup,8k4,' +
98:             'nsub,8k6,sube,8k7,supe,8kl,oplus,8kn,otimes,8l5,perp,8m5,sdot,8o8,lceil,8o9,rceil,8oa,lfloor,8ob,' +
99:             'rfloor,8p9,lang,8pa,rang,9ea,loz,9j0,spades,9j3,clubs,9j5,hearts,9j6,diams,ai,OElig,aj,oelig,b0,' +
100:             'Scaron,b1,scaron,bo,Yuml,m6,circ,ms,tilde,802,ensp,803,emsp,809,thinsp,80c,zwnj,80d,zwj,80e,lrm,' +
101:             '80f,rlm,80j,ndash,80k,mdash,80o,lsquo,80p,rsquo,80q,sbquo,80s,ldquo,80t,rdquo,80u,bdquo,810,dagger,' +
102:             '811,Dagger,81g,permil,81p,lsaquo,81q,rsaquo,85c,euro', 32);
103: 
104: 
105:     //Some basic mappings for attributes and default values.
106:     STYLES = {
107:         "strokeStyle":{
108:             svgAttr : "stroke", //corresponding svg attribute
109:             canvas : "#000000", //canvas default
110:             svg : "none",       //svg default
111:             apply : "stroke"    //apply on stroke() or fill()
112:         },
113:         "fillStyle":{
114:             svgAttr : "fill",
115:             canvas : "#000000",
116:             svg : null, //svg default is black, but we need to special case this to handle canvas stroke without fill
117:             apply : "fill"
118:         },
119:         "lineCap":{
120:             svgAttr : "stroke-linecap",
121:             canvas : "butt",
122:             svg : "butt",
123:             apply : "stroke"
124:         },
125:         "lineJoin":{
126:             svgAttr : "stroke-linejoin",
127:             canvas : "miter",
128:             svg : "miter",
129:             apply : "stroke"
130:         },
131:         "miterLimit":{
132:             svgAttr : "stroke-miterlimit",
133:             canvas : 10,
134:             svg : 4,
135:             apply : "stroke"
136:         },
137:         "lineWidth":{
138:             svgAttr : "stroke-width",
139:             canvas : 1,
140:             svg : 1,
141:             apply : "stroke"
142:         },
143:         "globalAlpha": {
144:             svgAttr : "opacity",
145:             canvas : 1,
146:             svg : 1,
147:             apply :  "fill stroke"
148:         },
149:         "font":{
150:             //font converts to multiple svg attributes, there is custom logic for this
151:             canvas : "10px sans-serif"
152:         },
153:         "shadowColor":{
154:             canvas : "#000000"
155:         },
156:         "shadowOffsetX":{
157:             canvas : 0
158:         },
159:         "shadowOffsetY":{
160:             canvas : 0
161:         },
162:         "shadowBlur":{
163:             canvas : 0
164:         },
165:         "textAlign":{
166:             canvas : "start"
167:         },
168:         "textBaseline":{
169:             canvas : "alphabetic"
170:         },
171:         "lineDash" : {
172:             svgAttr : "stroke-dasharray",
173:             canvas : [],
174:             svg : null,
175:             apply : "stroke"
176:         }
177:     };
178: 
179:     /**
180:      *
181:      * @param gradientNode - reference to the gradient
182:      * @constructor
183:      */
184:     CanvasGradient = function (gradientNode, ctx) {
185:         this.__root = gradientNode;
186:         this.__ctx = ctx;
187:     };
188: 
189:     /**
190:      * Adds a color stop to the gradient root
191:      */
192:     CanvasGradient.prototype.addColorStop = function (offset, color) {
193:         var stop = this.__ctx.__createElement("stop"), regex, matches;
194:         stop.setAttribute("offset", offset);
195:         if (color.indexOf("rgba") !== -1) {
196:             //separate alpha value, since webkit can't handle it
197:             regex = /rgba\(\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d?\.?\d*)\s*\)/gi;
198:             matches = regex.exec(color);
199:             stop.setAttribute("stop-color", format("rgb({r},{g},{b})", {r:matches[1], g:matches[2], b:matches[3]}));
200:             stop.setAttribute("stop-opacity", matches[4]);
201:         } else {
202:             stop.setAttribute("stop-color", color);
203:         }
204:         this.__root.appendChild(stop);
205:     };
206: 
207:     CanvasPattern = function (pattern, ctx) {
208:         this.__root = pattern;
209:         this.__ctx = ctx;
210:     };
211: 
212:     /**
213:      * The mock canvas context
214:      * @param o - options include:
215:      * ctx - existing Context2D to wrap around
216:      * width - width of your canvas (defaults to 500)
217:      * height - height of your canvas (defaults to 500)
218:      * enableMirroring - enables canvas mirroring (get image data) (defaults to false)
219:      * document - the document object (defaults to the current document)
220:      */
221:     ctx = function (o) {
222:         var defaultOptions = { width:500, height:500, enableMirroring : false}, options;
223: 
224:         //keep support for this way of calling C2S: new C2S(width,height)
225:         if (arguments.length > 1) {
226:             options = defaultOptions;
227:             options.width = arguments[0];
228:             options.height = arguments[1];
229:         } else if ( !o ) {
230:             options = defaultOptions;
231:         } else {
232:             options = o;
233:         }
234: 
235:         if (!(this instanceof ctx)) {
236:             //did someone call this without new?
237:             return new ctx(options);
238:         }
239: 
240:         //setup options
241:         this.width = options.width || defaultOptions.width;
242:         this.height = options.height || defaultOptions.height;
243:         this.enableMirroring = options.enableMirroring !== undefined ? options.enableMirroring : defaultOptions.enableMirroring;
244: 
245:         this.canvas = this;   ///point back to this instance!
246:         this.__document = options.document || document;
247: 
248:         // allow passing in an existing context to wrap around
249:         // if a context is passed in, we know a canvas already exist
250:         if (options.ctx) {
251:             this.__ctx = options.ctx;
252:         } else {
253:             this.__canvas = this.__document.createElement("canvas");
254:             this.__ctx = this.__canvas.getContext("2d");
255:         }
256: 
257:         this.__setDefaultStyles();
258:         this.__stack = [this.__getStyleState()];
259:         this.__groupStack = [];
260: 
261:         //the root svg element
262:         this.__root = this.__document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "svg");
263:         this.__root.setAttribute("version", 1.1);
264:         this.__root.setAttribute("xmlns", "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg");
265:         this.__root.setAttributeNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/xmlns/", "xmlns:xlink", "http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink");
266:         this.__root.setAttribute("width", this.width);
267:         this.__root.setAttribute("height", this.height);
268: 
269:         //make sure we don't generate the same ids in defs
270:         this.__ids = {};
271: 
272:         //defs tag
273:         this.__defs = this.__document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "defs");
274:         this.__root.appendChild(this.__defs);
275: 
276:         //also add a group child. the svg element can't use the transform attribute
277:         this.__currentElement = this.__document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
278:         this.__root.appendChild(this.__currentElement);
279:     };
280: 
281: 
282:     /**
283:      * Creates the specified svg element
284:      * @private
285:      */
286:     ctx.prototype.__createElement = function (elementName, properties, resetFill) {
287:         if (typeof properties === "undefined") {
288:             properties = {};
289:         }
290: 
291:         var element = this.__document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", elementName),
292:             keys = Object.keys(properties), i, key;
293:         if (resetFill) {
294:             //if fill or stroke is not specified, the svg element should not display. By default SVG's fill is black.
295:             element.setAttribute("fill", "none");
296:             element.setAttribute("stroke", "none");
297:         }
298:         for (i=0; i<keys.length; i++) {
299:             key = keys[i];
300:             element.setAttribute(key, properties[key]);
301:         }
302:         return element;
303:     };
304: 
305:     /**
306:      * Applies default canvas styles to the context
307:      * @private
308:      */
309:     ctx.prototype.__setDefaultStyles = function () {
310:         //default 2d canvas context properties see:http://www.w3.org/TR/2dcontext/
311:         var keys = Object.keys(STYLES), i, key;
312:         for (i=0; i<keys.length; i++) {
313:             key = keys[i];
314:             this[key] = STYLES[key].canvas;
315:         }
316:     };
317: 
318:     /**
319:      * Applies styles on restore
320:      * @param styleState
321:      * @private
322:      */
323:     ctx.prototype.__applyStyleState = function (styleState) {
324:         var keys = Object.keys(styleState), i, key;
325:         for (i=0; i<keys.length; i++) {
326:             key = keys[i];
327:             this[key] = styleState[key];
328:         }
329:     };
330: 
331:     /**
332:      * Gets the current style state
333:      * @return {Object}
334:      * @private
335:      */
336:     ctx.prototype.__getStyleState = function () {
337:         var i, styleState = {}, keys = Object.keys(STYLES), key;
338:         for (i=0; i<keys.length; i++) {
339:             key = keys[i];
340:             styleState[key] = this[key];
341:         }
342:         return styleState;
343:     };
344: 
345:     /**
346:      * Apples the current styles to the current SVG element. On "ctx.fill" or "ctx.stroke"
347:      * @param type
348:      * @private
349:      */
350:     ctx.prototype.__applyStyleToCurrentElement = function (type) {
351: 	this.lineCap = 'round';
352:     	var currentElement = this.__currentElement;
353:     	var currentStyleGroup = this.__currentElementsToStyle;
354:     	if (currentStyleGroup) {
355:     		currentElement.setAttribute(type, "");
356:     		currentElement = currentStyleGroup.element;
357:     		currentStyleGroup.children.forEach(function (node) {
358:     			node.setAttribute(type, "");
359:     		})
360:     	}
361: 
362:         var keys = Object.keys(STYLES), i, style, value, id, regex, matches;
363:         for (i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
364:             style = STYLES[keys[i]];
365:             value = this[keys[i]];
366:             if (style.apply) {
367:                 //is this a gradient or pattern?
368:                 if (value instanceof CanvasPattern) {
369:                     //pattern
370:                     if (value.__ctx) {
371:                         //copy over defs
372:                         while(value.__ctx.__defs.childNodes.length) {
373:                             id = value.__ctx.__defs.childNodes[0].getAttribute("id");
374:                             this.__ids[id] = id;
375:                             this.__defs.appendChild(value.__ctx.__defs.childNodes[0]);
376:                         }
377:                     }
378:                     currentElement.setAttribute(style.apply, format("url(#{id})", {id:value.__root.getAttribute("id")}));
379:                 }
380:                 else if (value instanceof CanvasGradient) {
381:                     //gradient
382:                     currentElement.setAttribute(style.apply, format("url(#{id})", {id:value.__root.getAttribute("id")}));
383:                 } else if (style.apply.indexOf(type)!==-1 && style.svg !== value) {
384:                     if ((style.svgAttr === "stroke" || style.svgAttr === "fill") && value.indexOf("rgba") !== -1) {
385:                         //separate alpha value, since illustrator can't handle it
386:                         regex = /rgba\(\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d?\.?\d*)\s*\)/gi;
387:                         matches = regex.exec(value);
388:                         currentElement.setAttribute(style.svgAttr, format("rgb({r},{g},{b})", {r:matches[1], g:matches[2], b:matches[3]}));
389:                         //should take globalAlpha here
390:                         var opacity = matches[4];
391:                         var globalAlpha = this.globalAlpha;
392:                         if (globalAlpha != null) {
393:                             opacity *= globalAlpha;
394:                         }
395:                         currentElement.setAttribute(style.svgAttr+"-opacity", opacity);
396:                     } else {
397:                         var attr = style.svgAttr;
398:                         if (keys[i] === 'globalAlpha') {
399:                             attr = type+'-'+style.svgAttr;
400:                             if (currentElement.getAttribute(attr)) {
401:                                  //fill-opacity or stroke-opacity has already been set by stroke or fill.
402:                                 continue;
403:                             }
404:                         }
405:                         //otherwise only update attribute if right type, and not svg default
406:                         currentElement.setAttribute(attr, value);
407:                     }
408:                 }
409:             }
410:         }
411:     };
412: 
413:     /**
414:      * Will return the closest group or svg node. May return the current element.
415:      * @private
416:      */
417:     ctx.prototype.__closestGroupOrSvg = function (node) {
418:         node = node || this.__currentElement;
419:         if (node.nodeName === "g" || node.nodeName === "svg") {
420:             return node;
421:         } else {
422:             return this.__closestGroupOrSvg(node.parentNode);
423:         }
424:     };
425: 
426:     /**
427:      * Returns the serialized value of the svg so far
428:      * @param fixNamedEntities - Standalone SVG doesn't support named entities, which document.createTextNode encodes.
429:      *                           If true, we attempt to find all named entities and encode it as a numeric entity.
430:      * @return serialized svg
431:      */
432:     ctx.prototype.getSerializedSvg = function (fixNamedEntities) {
433:         var serialized = new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(this.__root),
434:             keys, i, key, value, regexp, xmlns;
435: 
436:         //IE search for a duplicate xmnls because they didn't implement setAttributeNS correctly
437:         xmlns = /xmlns="http:\/\/www\.w3\.org\/2000\/svg".+xmlns="http:\/\/www\.w3\.org\/2000\/svg/gi;
438:         if (xmlns.test(serialized)) {
439:             serialized = serialized.replace('xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink');
440:         }
441: 
442:         if (fixNamedEntities) {
443:             keys = Object.keys(namedEntities);
444:             //loop over each named entity and replace with the proper equivalent.
445:             for (i=0; i<keys.length; i++) {
446:                 key = keys[i];
447:                 value = namedEntities[key];
448:                 regexp = new RegExp(key, "gi");
449:                 if (regexp.test(serialized)) {
450:                     serialized = serialized.replace(regexp, value);
451:                 }
452:             }
453:         }
454: 
455:         return serialized;
456:     };
457: 
458: 
459:     /**
460:      * Returns the root svg
461:      * @return
462:      */
463:     ctx.prototype.getSvg = function () {
464:         return this.__root;
465:     };
466:     /**
467:      * Will generate a group tag.
468:      */
469:     ctx.prototype.save = function () {
470:         var group = this.__createElement("g");
471:         var parent = this.__closestGroupOrSvg();
472:         this.__groupStack.push(parent);
473:         parent.appendChild(group);
474:         this.__currentElement = group;
475:         this.__stack.push(this.__getStyleState());
476:     };
477:     /**
478:      * Sets current element to parent, or just root if already root
479:      */
480:     ctx.prototype.restore = function () {
481:         this.__currentElement = this.__groupStack.pop();
482:         this.__currentElementsToStyle = null;
483:         //Clearing canvas will make the poped group invalid, currentElement is set to the root group node.
484:         if (!this.__currentElement) {
485:             this.__currentElement = this.__root.childNodes[1];
486:         }
487:         var state = this.__stack.pop();
488:         this.__applyStyleState(state);
489:     };
490: 
491:     /**
492:      * Helper method to add transform
493:      * @private
494:      */
495:     ctx.prototype.__addTransform = function (t) {
496:         //if the current element has siblings, add another group
497:         var parent = this.__closestGroupOrSvg();
498:         if (parent.childNodes.length > 0) {
499:         	if (this.__currentElement.nodeName === "path") {
500:         		if (!this.__currentElementsToStyle) this.__currentElementsToStyle = {element: parent, children: []};
501:         		this.__currentElementsToStyle.children.push(this.__currentElement)
502:         		this.__applyCurrentDefaultPath();
503:         	}
504: 
505:             var group = this.__createElement("g");
506:             parent.appendChild(group);
507:             this.__currentElement = group;
508:         }
509: 
510:         var transform = this.__currentElement.getAttribute("transform");
511:         if (transform) {
512:             transform += " ";
513:         } else {
514:             transform = "";
515:         }
516:         transform += t;
517:         this.__currentElement.setAttribute("transform", transform);
518:     };
519: 
520:     /**
521:      *  scales the current element
522:      */
523:     ctx.prototype.scale = function (x, y) {
524:         if (y === undefined) {
525:             y = x;
526:         }
527:         this.__addTransform(format("scale({x},{y})", {x:x, y:y}));
528:     };
529: 
530:     /**
531:      * rotates the current element
532:      */
533:     ctx.prototype.rotate = function (angle) {
534:         var degrees = (angle * 180 / Math.PI);
535:         this.__addTransform(format("rotate({angle},{cx},{cy})", {angle:degrees, cx:0, cy:0}));
536:     };
537: 
538:     /**
539:      * translates the current element
540:      */
541:     ctx.prototype.translate = function (x, y) {
542:         this.__addTransform(format("translate({x},{y})", {x:x,y:y}));
543:     };
544: 
545:     /**
546:      * applies a transform to the current element
547:      */
548:     ctx.prototype.transform = function (a, b, c, d, e, f) {
549:         this.__addTransform(format("matrix({a},{b},{c},{d},{e},{f})", {a:a, b:b, c:c, d:d, e:e, f:f}));
550:     };
551: 
552:     /**
553:      * Create a new Path Element
554:      */
555:     ctx.prototype.beginPath = function () {
556:         var path, parent;
557: 
558:         // Note that there is only one current default path, it is not part of the drawing state.
559:         // See also: https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/scripting.html#current-default-path
560:         this.__currentDefaultPath = "";
561:         this.__currentPosition = {};
562: 
563:         path = this.__createElement("path", {}, true);
564:         parent = this.__closestGroupOrSvg();
565:         parent.appendChild(path);
566:         this.__currentElement = path;
567:     };
568: 
569:     /**
570:      * Helper function to apply currentDefaultPath to current path element
571:      * @private
572:      */
573:     ctx.prototype.__applyCurrentDefaultPath = function () {
574:     	var currentElement = this.__currentElement;
575:         if (currentElement.nodeName === "path") {
576: 			currentElement.setAttribute("d", this.__currentDefaultPath);
577:         } else {
578: 			console.error("Attempted to apply path command to node", currentElement.nodeName);
579:         }
580:     };
581: 
582:     /**
583:      * Helper function to add path command
584:      * @private
585:      */
586:     ctx.prototype.__addPathCommand = function (command) {
587:         this.__currentDefaultPath += " ";
588:         this.__currentDefaultPath += command;
589:     };
590: 
591:     /**
592:      * Adds the move command to the current path element,
593:      * if the currentPathElement is not empty create a new path element
594:      */
595:     ctx.prototype.moveTo = function (x,y) {
596:         if (this.__currentElement.nodeName !== "path") {
597:             this.beginPath();
598:         }
599: 
600:         // creates a new subpath with the given point
601:         this.__currentPosition = {x: x, y: y};
602:         this.__addPathCommand(format("M {x} {y}", {x:x, y:y}));
603:     };
604: 
605:     /**
606:      * Closes the current path
607:      */
608:     ctx.prototype.closePath = function () {
609:         if (this.__currentDefaultPath) {
610:             this.__addPathCommand("Z");
611:         }
612:     };
613: 
614:     /**
615:      * Adds a line to command
616:      */
617:     ctx.prototype.lineTo = function (x, y) {
618:         this.__currentPosition = {x: x, y: y};
619:         if (this.__currentDefaultPath.indexOf('M') > -1) {
620:             this.__addPathCommand(format("L {x} {y}", {x:x, y:y}));
621:         } else {
622:             this.__addPathCommand(format("M {x} {y}", {x:x, y:y}));
623:         }
624:     };
625: 
626:     /**
627:      * Add a bezier command
628:      */
629:     ctx.prototype.bezierCurveTo = function (cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, x, y) {
630:         this.__currentPosition = {x: x, y: y};
631:         this.__addPathCommand(format("C {cp1x} {cp1y} {cp2x} {cp2y} {x} {y}",
632:             {cp1x:cp1x, cp1y:cp1y, cp2x:cp2x, cp2y:cp2y, x:x, y:y}));
633:     };
634: 
635:     /**
636:      * Adds a quadratic curve to command
637:      */
638:     ctx.prototype.quadraticCurveTo = function (cpx, cpy, x, y) {
639:         this.__currentPosition = {x: x, y: y};
640:         this.__addPathCommand(format("Q {cpx} {cpy} {x} {y}", {cpx:cpx, cpy:cpy, x:x, y:y}));
641:     };
642: 
643: 
644:     /**
645:      * Return a new normalized vector of given vector
646:      */
647:     var normalize = function (vector) {
648:         var len = Math.sqrt(vector[0] * vector[0] + vector[1] * vector[1]);
649:         return [vector[0] / len, vector[1] / len];
650:     };
651: 
652:     /**
653:      * Adds the arcTo to the current path
654:      *
655:      * @see http://www.w3.org/TR/2015/WD-2dcontext-20150514/#dom-context-2d-arcto
656:      */
657:     ctx.prototype.arcTo = function (x1, y1, x2, y2, radius) {
658:         // Let the point (x0, y0) be the last point in the subpath.
659:         var x0 = this.__currentPosition && this.__currentPosition.x;
660:         var y0 = this.__currentPosition && this.__currentPosition.y;
661: 
662:         // First ensure there is a subpath for (x1, y1).
663:         if (typeof x0 == "undefined" || typeof y0 == "undefined") {
664:             return;
665:         }
666: 
667:         // Negative values for radius must cause the implementation to throw an IndexSizeError exception.
668:         if (radius < 0) {
669:             throw new Error("IndexSizeError: The radius provided (" + radius + ") is negative.");
670:         }
671: 
672:         // If the point (x0, y0) is equal to the point (x1, y1),
673:         // or if the point (x1, y1) is equal to the point (x2, y2),
674:         // or if the radius radius is zero,
675:         // then the method must add the point (x1, y1) to the subpath,
676:         // and connect that point to the previous point (x0, y0) by a straight line.
677:         if (((x0 === x1) && (y0 === y1))
678:             || ((x1 === x2) && (y1 === y2))
679:             || (radius === 0)) {
680:             this.lineTo(x1, y1);
681:             return;
682:         }
683: 
684:         // Otherwise, if the points (x0, y0), (x1, y1), and (x2, y2) all lie on a single straight line,
685:         // then the method must add the point (x1, y1) to the subpath,
686:         // and connect that point to the previous point (x0, y0) by a straight line.
687:         var unit_vec_p1_p0 = normalize([x0 - x1, y0 - y1]);
688:         var unit_vec_p1_p2 = normalize([x2 - x1, y2 - y1]);
689:         if (unit_vec_p1_p0[0] * unit_vec_p1_p2[1] === unit_vec_p1_p0[1] * unit_vec_p1_p2[0]) {
690:             this.lineTo(x1, y1);
691:             return;
692:         }
693: 
694:         // Otherwise, let The Arc be the shortest arc given by circumference of the circle that has radius radius,
695:         // and that has one point tangent to the half-infinite line that crosses the point (x0, y0) and ends at the point (x1, y1),
696:         // and that has a different point tangent to the half-infinite line that ends at the point (x1, y1), and crosses the point (x2, y2).
697:         // The points at which this circle touches these two lines are called the start and end tangent points respectively.
698: 
699:         // note that both vectors are unit vectors, so the length is 1
700:         var cos = (unit_vec_p1_p0[0] * unit_vec_p1_p2[0] + unit_vec_p1_p0[1] * unit_vec_p1_p2[1]);
701:         var theta = Math.acos(Math.abs(cos));
702: 
703:         // Calculate origin
704:         var unit_vec_p1_origin = normalize([
705:             unit_vec_p1_p0[0] + unit_vec_p1_p2[0],
706:             unit_vec_p1_p0[1] + unit_vec_p1_p2[1]
707:         ]);
708:         var len_p1_origin = radius / Math.sin(theta / 2);
709:         var x = x1 + len_p1_origin * unit_vec_p1_origin[0];
710:         var y = y1 + len_p1_origin * unit_vec_p1_origin[1];
711: 
712:         // Calculate start angle and end angle
713:         // rotate 90deg clockwise (note that y axis points to its down)
714:         var unit_vec_origin_start_tangent = [
715:             -unit_vec_p1_p0[1],
716:             unit_vec_p1_p0[0]
717:         ];
718:         // rotate 90deg counter clockwise (note that y axis points to its down)
719:         var unit_vec_origin_end_tangent = [
720:             unit_vec_p1_p2[1],
721:             -unit_vec_p1_p2[0]
722:         ];
723:         var getAngle = function (vector) {
724:             // get angle (clockwise) between vector and (1, 0)
725:             var x = vector[0];
726:             var y = vector[1];
727:             if (y >= 0) { // note that y axis points to its down
728:                 return Math.acos(x);
729:             } else {
730:                 return -Math.acos(x);
731:             }
732:         };
733:         var startAngle = getAngle(unit_vec_origin_start_tangent);
734:         var endAngle = getAngle(unit_vec_origin_end_tangent);
735: 
736:         // Connect the point (x0, y0) to the start tangent point by a straight line
737:         this.lineTo(x + unit_vec_origin_start_tangent[0] * radius,
738:                     y + unit_vec_origin_start_tangent[1] * radius);
739: 
740:         // Connect the start tangent point to the end tangent point by arc
741:         // and adding the end tangent point to the subpath.
742:         this.arc(x, y, radius, startAngle, endAngle);
743:     };
744: 
745:     /**
746:      * Sets the stroke property on the current element
747:      */
748:     ctx.prototype.stroke = function () {
749:         if (this.__currentElement.nodeName === "path") {
750:             this.__currentElement.setAttribute("paint-order", "fill stroke markers");
751:         }
752:         this.__applyCurrentDefaultPath();
753:         this.__applyStyleToCurrentElement("stroke");
754:     };
755: 
756:     /**
757:      * Sets fill properties on the current element
758:      */
759:     ctx.prototype.fill = function () {
760:         if (this.__currentElement.nodeName === "path") {
761:             this.__currentElement.setAttribute("paint-order", "stroke fill markers");
762:         }
763:         this.__applyCurrentDefaultPath();
764:         this.__applyStyleToCurrentElement("fill");
765:     };
766: 
767:     /**
768:      *  Adds a rectangle to the path.
769:      */
770:     ctx.prototype.rect = function (x, y, width, height) {
771:         if (this.__currentElement.nodeName !== "path") {
772:             this.beginPath();
773:         }
774:         this.moveTo(x, y);
775:         this.lineTo(x+width, y);
776:         this.lineTo(x+width, y+height);
777:         this.lineTo(x, y+height);
778:         this.lineTo(x, y);
779:         this.closePath();
780:     };
781: 
782: 
783:     /**
784:      * adds a rectangle element
785:      */
786:     ctx.prototype.fillRect = function (x, y, width, height) {
787:         var rect, parent;
788:         rect = this.__createElement("rect", {
789:             x : x,
790:             y : y,
791:             width : width,
792:             height : height
793:         }, true);
794:         parent = this.__closestGroupOrSvg();
795:         parent.appendChild(rect);
796:         this.__currentElement = rect;
797:         this.__applyStyleToCurrentElement("fill");
798:     };
799: 
800:     /**
801:      * Draws a rectangle with no fill
802:      * @param x
803:      * @param y
804:      * @param width
805:      * @param height
806:      */
807:     ctx.prototype.strokeRect = function (x, y, width, height) {
808:         var rect, parent;
809:         rect = this.__createElement("rect", {
810:             x : x,
811:             y : y,
812:             width : width,
813:             height : height
814:         }, true);
815:         parent = this.__closestGroupOrSvg();
816:         parent.appendChild(rect);
817:         this.__currentElement = rect;
818:         this.__applyStyleToCurrentElement("stroke");
819:     };
820: 
821: 
822:     /**
823:      * Clear entire canvas:
824:      * 1. save current transforms
825:      * 2. remove all the childNodes of the root g element
826:      */
827:     ctx.prototype.__clearCanvas = function () {
828:         var current = this.__closestGroupOrSvg(),
829:             transform = current.getAttribute("transform");
830:         var rootGroup = this.__root.childNodes[1];
831:         var childNodes = rootGroup.childNodes;
832:         for (var i = childNodes.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
833:             if (childNodes[i]) {
834:                 rootGroup.removeChild(childNodes[i]);
835:             }
836:         }
837:         this.__currentElement = rootGroup;
838:         //reset __groupStack as all the child group nodes are all removed.
839:         this.__groupStack = [];
840:         if (transform) {
841:             this.__addTransform(transform);
842:         }
843:     };
844: 
845:     /**
846:      * "Clears" a canvas by just drawing a white rectangle in the current group.
847:      */
848:     ctx.prototype.clearRect = function (x, y, width, height) {
849:         //clear entire canvas
850:         if (x === 0 && y === 0 && width === this.width && height === this.height) {
851:             this.__clearCanvas();
852:             return;
853:         }
854:         var rect, parent = this.__closestGroupOrSvg();
855:         rect = this.__createElement("rect", {
856:             x : x,
857:             y : y,
858:             width : width,
859:             height : height,
860:             fill : "#FFFFFF"
861:         }, true);
862:         parent.appendChild(rect);
863:     };
864: 
865:     /**
866:      * Adds a linear gradient to a defs tag.
867:      * Returns a canvas gradient object that has a reference to it's parent def
868:      */
869:     ctx.prototype.createLinearGradient = function (x1, y1, x2, y2) {
870:         var grad = this.__createElement("linearGradient", {
871:             id : randomString(this.__ids),
872:             x1 : x1+"px",
873:             x2 : x2+"px",
874:             y1 : y1+"px",
875:             y2 : y2+"px",
876:             "gradientUnits" : "userSpaceOnUse"
877:         }, false);
878:         this.__defs.appendChild(grad);
879:         return new CanvasGradient(grad, this);
880:     };
881: 
882:     /**
883:      * Adds a radial gradient to a defs tag.
884:      * Returns a canvas gradient object that has a reference to it's parent def
885:      */
886:     ctx.prototype.createRadialGradient = function (x0, y0, r0, x1, y1, r1) {
887:         var grad = this.__createElement("radialGradient", {
888:             id : randomString(this.__ids),
889:             cx : x1+"px",
890:             cy : y1+"px",
891:             r  : r1+"px",
892:             fx : x0+"px",
893:             fy : y0+"px",
894:             "gradientUnits" : "userSpaceOnUse"
895:         }, false);
896:         this.__defs.appendChild(grad);
897:         return new CanvasGradient(grad, this);
898: 
899:     };
900: 
901:     /**
902:      * Parses the font string and returns svg mapping
903:      * @private
904:      */
905:     ctx.prototype.__parseFont = function () {
906:         var regex = /^\s*(?=(?:(?:[-a-z]+\s*){0,2}(italic|oblique))?)(?=(?:(?:[-a-z]+\s*){0,2}(small-caps))?)(?=(?:(?:[-a-z]+\s*){0,2}(bold(?:er)?|lighter|[1-9]00))?)(?:(?:normal|\1|\2|\3)\s*){0,3}((?:xx?-)?(?:small|large)|medium|smaller|larger|[.\d]+(?:\%|in|[cem]m|ex|p[ctx]))(?:\s*\/\s*(normal|[.\d]+(?:\%|in|[cem]m|ex|p[ctx])))?\s*([-,\'\"\sa-z0-9]+?)\s*$/i;
907:         var fontPart = regex.exec( this.font );
908:         var data = {
909:             style : fontPart[1] || 'normal',
910:             size : fontPart[4] || '10px',
911:             family : fontPart[6] || 'sans-serif',
912:             weight: fontPart[3] || 'normal',
913:             decoration : fontPart[2] || 'normal',
914:             href : null
915:         };
916: 
917:         //canvas doesn't support underline natively, but we can pass this attribute
918:         if (this.__fontUnderline === "underline") {
919:             data.decoration = "underline";
920:         }
921: 
922:         //canvas also doesn't support linking, but we can pass this as well
923:         if (this.__fontHref) {
924:             data.href = this.__fontHref;
925:         }
926: 
927:         return data;
928:     };
929: 
930:     /**
931:      * Helper to link text fragments
932:      * @param font
933:      * @param element
934:      * @return {*}
935:      * @private
936:      */
937:     ctx.prototype.__wrapTextLink = function (font, element) {
938:         if (font.href) {
939:             var a = this.__createElement("a");
940:             a.setAttributeNS("http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink", "xlink:href", font.href);
941:             a.appendChild(element);
942:             return a;
943:         }
944:         return element;
945:     };
946: 
947:     /**
948:      * Fills or strokes text
949:      * @param text
950:      * @param x
951:      * @param y
952:      * @param action - stroke or fill
953:      * @private
954:      */
955:     ctx.prototype.__applyText = function (text, x, y, action) {
956:         var font = this.__parseFont(),
957:             parent = this.__closestGroupOrSvg(),
958:             textElement = this.__createElement("text", {
959:                 "font-family" : font.family,
960:                 "font-size" : font.size,
961:                 "font-style" : font.style,
962:                 "font-weight" : font.weight,
963:                 "text-decoration" : font.decoration,
964:                 "x" : x,
965:                 "y" : y,
966:                 "text-anchor": getTextAnchor(this.textAlign),
967:                 "dominant-baseline": getDominantBaseline(this.textBaseline)
968:             }, true);
969: 
970:         textElement.appendChild(this.__document.createTextNode(text));
971:         this.__currentElement = textElement;
972:         this.__applyStyleToCurrentElement(action);
973:         parent.appendChild(this.__wrapTextLink(font,textElement));
974:     };
975: 
976:     /**
977:      * Creates a text element
978:      * @param text
979:      * @param x
980:      * @param y
981:      */
982:     ctx.prototype.fillText = function (text, x, y) {
983:         this.__applyText(text, x, y, "fill");
984:     };
985: 
986:     /**
987:      * Strokes text
988:      * @param text
989:      * @param x
990:      * @param y
991:      */
992:     ctx.prototype.strokeText = function (text, x, y) {
993:         this.__applyText(text, x, y, "stroke");
994:     };
995: 
996:     /**
997:      * No need to implement this for svg.
998:      * @param text
999:      * @return {TextMetrics}
1000:      */
1001:     ctx.prototype.measureText = function (text) {
1002:         this.__ctx.font = this.font;
1003:         return this.__ctx.measureText(text);
1004:     };

1006:     /**
1007:      *  Arc command!
1008:      */
1009:     ctx.prototype.arc = function (x, y, radius, startAngle, endAngle, counterClockwise) {
1010:         // in canvas no circle is drawn if no angle is provided.
1011:         if (startAngle === endAngle) {
1012:             return;
1013:         }
1014:         startAngle = startAngle % (2*Math.PI);
1015:         endAngle = endAngle % (2*Math.PI);
1016: 	if (endAngle == 6.28318) endAngle = 6.27; // fix for missing posts
1017:         if (startAngle === endAngle) {
1018:             //circle time! subtract some of the angle so svg is happy (svg elliptical arc can't draw a full circle)
1019:             endAngle = ((endAngle + (2*Math.PI)) - 0.001 * (counterClockwise ? -1 : 1)) % (2*Math.PI);
1020:         }
1021:         var endX = x+radius*Math.cos(endAngle),
1022:             endY = y+radius*Math.sin(endAngle),
1023:             startX = x+radius*Math.cos(startAngle),
1024:             startY = y+radius*Math.sin(startAngle),
1025:             sweepFlag = counterClockwise ? 0 : 1,
1026:             largeArcFlag = 0,
1027:             diff = endAngle - startAngle;
1028: 
1029:         // https://github.com/gliffy/canvas2svg/issues/4
1030:         if (diff < 0) {
1031:             diff += 2*Math.PI;
1032:         }
1033: 
1034:         if (counterClockwise) {
1035:             largeArcFlag = diff > Math.PI ? 0 : 1;
1036:         } else {
1037:             largeArcFlag = diff > Math.PI ? 1 : 0;
1038:         }
1039: 
1040:         this.lineTo(startX, startY);
1041:         this.__addPathCommand(format("A {rx} {ry} {xAxisRotation} {largeArcFlag} {sweepFlag} {endX} {endY}",
1042:             {rx:radius, ry:radius, xAxisRotation:0, largeArcFlag:largeArcFlag, sweepFlag:sweepFlag, endX:endX, endY:endY}));
1043: 
1044:         this.__currentPosition = {x: endX, y: endY};
1045:     };
1046: 
1047:     // simple implementation of ellipse.  rotation is not supported
1048:     ctx.prototype.ellipse = function (x, y, radiusX, radiusY, rotation, startAngle, endAngle, counterClockwise) {
1049:         // in canvas no circle is drawn if no angle is provided.
1050:         if (startAngle === endAngle) {
1051:             return;
1052:         }
1053:         startAngle = startAngle % (2*Math.PI);
1054:         endAngle = endAngle % (2*Math.PI);
1055:         if (startAngle === endAngle) {
1056:             //circle time! subtract some of the angle so svg is happy (svg elliptical arc can't draw a full circle)
1057:             endAngle = ((endAngle + (2*Math.PI)) - 0.001 * (counterClockwise ? -1 : 1)) % (2*Math.PI);
1058:         }
1059:         var endX = x+radiusX*Math.cos(endAngle),
1060:             endY = y+radiusY*Math.sin(endAngle),
1061:             startX = x+radiusX*Math.cos(startAngle),
1062:             startY = y+radiusY*Math.sin(startAngle),
1063:             sweepFlag = counterClockwise ? 0 : 1,
1064:             largeArcFlag = 0,
1065:             diff = endAngle - startAngle;
1066: 
1067:         // https://github.com/gliffy/canvas2svg/issues/4
1068:         if (diff < 0) {
1069:             diff += 2*Math.PI;
1070:         }
1071: 
1072:         if (counterClockwise) {
1073:             largeArcFlag = diff > Math.PI ? 0 : 1;
1074:         } else {
1075:             largeArcFlag = diff > Math.PI ? 1 : 0;
1076:         }
1077: 
1078:         this.lineTo(startX, startY);
1079:         this.__addPathCommand(format("A {rx} {ry} {xAxisRotation} {largeArcFlag} {sweepFlag} {endX} {endY}",
1080:             {rx:radiusX, ry:radiusY, xAxisRotation:0, largeArcFlag:largeArcFlag, sweepFlag:sweepFlag, endX:endX, endY:endY}));
1081: 
1082:         this.__currentPosition = {x: endX, y: endY};
1083:     };
1084: 
1085:     /**
1086:      * Generates a ClipPath from the clip command.
1087:      */
1088:     ctx.prototype.clip = function () {
1089:         var group = this.__closestGroupOrSvg(),
1090:             clipPath = this.__createElement("clipPath"),
1091:             id =  randomString(this.__ids),
1092:             newGroup = this.__createElement("g");
1093: 
1094:         this.__applyCurrentDefaultPath();
1095:         group.removeChild(this.__currentElement);
1096:         clipPath.setAttribute("id", id);
1097:         clipPath.appendChild(this.__currentElement);
1098: 
1099:         this.__defs.appendChild(clipPath);
1100: 
1101:         //set the clip path to this group

1169:                     var transformDirective;
1170:                     if (originTransform) {
1171:                         transformDirective = originTransform+" "+translateDirective;
1172:                     } else {

1180:             //canvas or image
1181:             svgImage = this.__createElement("image");

1183:             svgImage.setAttribute("height", dh);

1190:                 canvas.height = dh;
